Solana memecoin tools for traders, groups, and launches

SlimeWire combines scanner, rug checker, live pair board, trading terminal, Telegram bot, copy trading, volume tools, and launch support in one Solana-native stack.

Open SlimeWireOpen @SlimeWiredBot

Useful without adding clutter

Scanner

Paste a CA and get token context, links, chart access, and safety notes.

Live pairs

Watch fresh and moving Solana pairs from the terminal.

Rug checker

Surface visible risks before a trade becomes a blind chase.

Trade presets

Use preset amounts, slippage, TP/SL, and timer exits.

Community bot

Bring scans and alerts to Telegram groups through @SlimeWiredBot.

Launch tools

Support new coins with launch, volume, raid, and visibility flows.

FAQ

What Solana memecoin tools does SlimeWire include?

SlimeWire includes live pairs, Telegram scans, chart views, rug checking, quick buys, copy trading, volume tools, launch tools, positions, and PnL tracking.

Can I scan a Solana token before buying?

Yes. Paste a token address into SlimeWire or @SlimeWiredBot to review available market data, safety context, links, and chart access before trading.

Does SlimeWire support fresh launches?

Yes. SlimeWire is built around fresh Solana pair discovery, launch watch flows, quick chart access, and trading controls for fast-moving markets.

Can communities use SlimeWire tools?

Yes. Telegram groups can use SlimeWire for scans, alerts, raid-style engagement, verification flows, and trading-aware community tools.

Are these tools separate apps?

No. SlimeWire combines the Telegram bot and web terminal so traders can move between alerts, scans, charts, and execution without tool hopping.
